starry_unigraph.providers package

class starry_unigraph.providers.CTDGProvider(task_adapter: Any)[source]

Bases: BaseProvider

Provider for Continuous-Time Dynamic Graphs using the Online runtime.

Lifecycle:

  1. prepare_data() — preprocess raw events into artifacts.

  2. build_runtime() — build dataset, sampler, memory, model, optimizer, memory updater, and CTDGOnlineRuntime.

  3. build_train_iterator() etc. — yield CTDGDataBatch.

  4. run_train_step() etc. — delegate to CTDGOnlineRuntime.

  5. save_checkpoint() / load_checkpoint() — serialize model + memory updater weights.

build_eval_iterator(session_ctx: SessionContext, split: str = 'val') → Iterable[Any][source]
build_predict_iterator(session_ctx: SessionContext, split: str = 'test') → Iterable[Any][source]
build_runtime(session_ctx: SessionContext) → RuntimeBundle[source]
build_train_iterator(session_ctx: SessionContext, split: str = 'train') → Iterable[Any][source]
graph_mode = 'ctdg'
load_checkpoint(path: str | Path) → None[source]
prepare_data(session_ctx: SessionContext) → PreparedArtifacts[source]
provider_key = 'ctdg'
run_eval_step(batch: Any) → dict[str, Any][source]
run_predict_step(batch: Any) → dict[str, Any][source]
run_train_step(batch: Any) → dict[str, Any][source]
save_checkpoint(path: str | Path) → None[source]
class starry_unigraph.providers.DTDGProvider(task_adapter: Any)[source]

Bases: BaseProvider

Provider for Discrete-Time Dynamic Graphs using the Flare pipeline.

Lifecycle:

  1. prepare_data() — preprocess raw data into partition artifacts.

  2. build_runtime() — load partition, init model/optimizer/DDP.

  3. build_train_iterator() / build_eval_iterator() / build_predict_iterator() — yield batches.

  4. run_train_step() / run_eval_step() / run_predict_step() — execute one forward(/backward) step.

build_eval_iterator(session_ctx: SessionContext, split: str = 'val') → Iterable[Any][source]
build_predict_iterator(session_ctx: SessionContext, split: str = 'test') → Iterable[Any][source]
build_runtime(session_ctx: SessionContext) → RuntimeBundle[source]
build_train_iterator(session_ctx: SessionContext, split: str = 'train') → Iterable[Any][source]
graph_mode = 'dtdg'
prepare_data(session_ctx: SessionContext) → PreparedArtifacts[source]
provider_key = 'dtdg'
run_eval_step(batch: Any) → dict[str, Any][source]
run_predict_step(batch: Any) → dict[str, Any][source]
run_train_step(batch: Any) → dict[str, Any][source]
